title: Monster Beverage Investor Relations
note: Primary investor-relations hub for company filings, annual reports, releases, and corporate information.

note: Company earnings release supporting recent sales, segment, and profitability context.

note: Market-cap source for the registry snapshot and current valuation metric.

note: Market-data source used for recent market capitalization and price-to-earnings context.

title: Monster Energy
note: Product and brand page for the flagship Monster Energy beverage family.

note: Product page for Monster Beverage's performance energy-drink line.

title: OpenCola
note: Reference point for open beverage recipes and the possibility of shareable, modifiable soft-drink formulas.

note: Background source on the open-source beverage recipe pattern.

title: Open Food Facts API Documentation
note: Technical documentation for an open food-product database and API that can support transparent beverage comparison.

note: Open-source project repository for the Open Food Facts database, API server, and web interface.

title: OSE Microfactory Concept
note: Conceptual source for distributed microfactory and collaborative local production models.
